speaker: MATT
raw_text: "There I shall reward you for your assistance. Now, I'll go to free my partner."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Guys need any help?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Should we--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll tear off a sheet of ribbon off of my sleeve and I'll wrap it around his forearm like a tight tourniquet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a medicine check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want me to stabilize him? I can do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's enough to stabilize, okay. You've prevented him from bleeding out. He looks pale and has lost a lot of blood and there is this dark pool that's still suffusing the space around him on the stone floor on the raised area of the hallway. So he's stable. Zsundie, as the rest of you came around the corner, you can see him standing there looking at the group. "Well, I have things to take care of now." It looks to you. "Ketiv Zsundie is my title. I've been held here for too long. Should you find yourself among the endless seas of my world, come to my Silversilt Palace."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 12, okay. Rifling through his bits, you find 21 gold pieces, 45 silver pieces, two platinum pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, no, let me see, I think he might be immune to it for the next 24 hours based on the ability.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.text: If he succeeds on it, yeah. I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well then, I go  I don't think you heard me. Whack-whack, and I'll try one more time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm going to double check here, but I think if he succeeds in the save he's immune to it for 24 hours. I could be wrong. Let me double check here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Has it been 24 hours yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can wait 24 hours and then come back to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's just sit here until it's Crash Pandas tomorrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll lean over to Nott and say  Nott, do me a favor and make sure he's not carrying anything fancy in his pockets.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Huh. Well, that may very well be a great turn of luck in my benefit, definitely. Thank you for looking into that."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So, you know that guy?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There are a number of guys that I know, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The guy that was bugging you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Algar, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We went to go talk to him, but he had already left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He left?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, he had fled the city, apparently. Things happened, they were real bad or something, I don't know.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, go ahead and take a short rest. You guys manage to enjoy probably one of the better meals you've had in a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Algar, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We went to go talk to him, but he had already left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He left?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, he had fled the city, apparently. Things happened, they were real bad or something, I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Huh. Well, that may very well be a great turn of luck in my benefit, definitely. Thank you for looking into that."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course! Yeah, we were going to talk to him and everything, but he is gone, so...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: " Well... that makes me feel more comfortable, thank you very much."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I appreciate it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you guys want to eat anything? (sounds of agreement)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well! I will ensure that you are all properly taken care of this night." (clapping twice) She goes ahead and brings the servants back in. A meal is placed for the rest of you, and as the evening progresses, and you take a bit of time to rest--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're within range.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's nice; it's eight points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go, eight points to Beau.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to start booking out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where're you going?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm heading back around the way I assume everyone else is going. Yeah, that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. There's Caduceus. Finishing your go. Yasha's up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha's going to rush up and aid Beau in trying to pull Marius towards the docks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. If she wants to, she can attempt to grapple and then pull him out of Beau's grip, or we can say she holds her action and then-- it gets a little weird, because it's-- movement is what you pull him out of the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Would it help make full speed when it comes back to Beau's turn if she's assisting? Can they double pull?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can she go, and then I assist on my turn?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, you find a pouch of 20 platinum pieces.
trigger_phrase: you find a pouch of 20 platinum pieces

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's a pirate!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's one word to say it. If you want to find her, your best bet is probably somewhere in the Swavain Islands. Don't know where directly. I'm just hired as the errand boy."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The Slavain Islands?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Swavain. S-W-A-V-A-I-N. "I was just supposed to come back here. Supposed to meet up with the folks of the Mist, the ship that you've now commandeered. You've killed them all. What are you going to do with me?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is a good question.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm useful. I'm helpful! I can swab the deck. I can cook."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What can you cook? That's interesting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What you got?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We don't know what we got. We stole this ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah, yeah you did."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Have we patted him down?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll pat him down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: By this point, by the way, everyone has 16 hit points added to their--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 18 for investigation.

raw_text: You find another pouch that's hidden within his belt pouch that contains 62 gold pieces, three silver, 50 copper, and what looks to be a pouch of chewing tobacco.

preceding_turns.text: That's the money he was going to return.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a lot.

preceding_turns.text: That's what he got paid.
